ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., hourly temperature readings) */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data collection method (e.g., weather stations, satellite imaging) */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, deprecated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source (e.g., weather stations, satellite imaging) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the source's website */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License information for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., weather stations, satellite imaging) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Spatial or temporal resolution of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of time for the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "feature_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the model was trained on */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
